name: @forgeax/engine-render-graph
description: Declarative render-graph abstraction: resource/pass declaration + compile() + execute(). RHI-pure package (depends on @forgeax/engine-rhi + @forgeax/engine-math only; never imports @forgeax/engine-runtime).

fps.reason: render-graph is a compile-time / orchestration layer without canvas; fps reported by consuming runtime apps

bench.reason: compile path is not perf-critical; bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math and runtime render loop

gate.reason: physical-isolation grep gate (check-render-graph-no-runtime-import) is a repo-root script wired into ci.yml lint job, not a per-package gate
